design_system.name: The Amber Prism
design_system.description: A premium, high-contrast design system inspired by architectural precision and warm sunlight. It moves away from sterile SaaS blues to a confident, energetic Orange/Amber palette grounded by warm stone greys.

identity.core_principle: Fusion of functional density (Bento Grids) with warm, organic textures.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. H1 should be text-4xl or 5xl for impact.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and table data. Excellent legibility at small sizes.

primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Critical CTAs

gradients.surface_glow: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(245, 132, 31, 0.08), transparent 40%)

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards instead of p-4.

dashboard.usage: Use col-span-12 md:col-span-3 for stats, col-span-12 md:col-span-8 for main charts.

sidebar.style: Fixed, Solid White Background with right border

page_header.style: Flex row, justified between. Title on left, Actions on right.
page_header.visual: Transparent background, no border, generous bottom padding.

variants.default: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-600 to-orange-500 hover:from-orange-700 hover:to-orange-600 text-white shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

Card.base: bg-white border border-stone-100/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

Input.style: bg-stone-50 border-stone-200 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-100 transition-all rounded-lg h-10

Table.header: bg-stone-50/50 text-stone-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-xs p-4

login_background.description: Abstract white and orange geometric architectural structure
login_background.usage: Full height split-screen background for Login Page. Apply an overlay: bg-orange-900/10 mix-blend-multiply.

placeholders.logo_placeholder: Use text 'SSC Track' in Outfit Bold if no SVG available.

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay (optional)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure orange text is purely decorative or large. For reading text, use Charcoal (#1A1510) on White.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-login').

do_not: Use default Shadcn styling without customization.
must_do: Add hover states to every clickable element.
Ensure charts use the brand palette (Orange, Amber, Emerald, Slate).

implementation_instructions: 1. Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific hex codes for primary, secondary, and accent colors.
2. Update index.css to set the new root variables for radius (0.75rem) and colors.
3. Customize the Shadcn Button component to use the gradient variant by default.
4. Refactor the Sidebar to use the new active state styles.
5. Apply the 'Bento Grid' layout to the Dashboard page.
6. Update the Login page to use the split-screen layout with the provided image.
7. Ensure all inputs and forms use the new rounded styles and focus rings.
